title: Log in and reach the dashboard
description: Verifies a user can sign in from the login page and lands on the dashboard after submitting valid credentials.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Prevent unauthenticated access to tests list
description: Verifies a signed-out user cannot access the tests list and is redirected to the login page.

steps.description: Navigate to /tests
Verify the user is on the login page

title: Complete an assessment from instructions through submission confirmation
description: Verifies a student can start an assessment, answer questions, submit successfully, and see the submission confirmation screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to available tests
Select an available test from the list
Proceed to the test instructions view
Start the test
Select valid answers for the visible questions
Submit the test
Verify a test submission confirmation is displayed

title: Prevent unauthenticated access to results pages
description: Verifies a signed-out user cannot access student or admin results pages and is redirected to the login page.

steps.description: Navigate to /results/student
Verify the user is on the login page

title: Start an assessment from the tests list
description: Verifies a signed-in user can browse tests and begin the selected test, landing on the pre-test instructions screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to view tests
Select a test from the list to start
Verify the user is on the assessment instructions page

title: Block submission when required questions are unanswered
description: Verifies the assessment cannot be submitted with unanswered required questions and a validation error is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to available tests
Select an available test from the list
Proceed to the test instructions view
Start the test
Attempt to submit the test without answering all required questions
Verify a submission validation error is visible
Verify the user remains in the active assessment experience

title: Open tests list from dashboard
description: Verifies a signed-in user can navigate from the dashboard to the tests list to browse available tests.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Wait for the dashboard to finish loading
Click the link to browse tests
Verify available tests are displayed

title: Student can view their results details
description: Verifies a signed-in student can open the student results page and see performance details and breakdowns.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to view student results
Verify individual performance details are displayed

title: Create a new test end-to-end and see it available in Tests
description: Verifies an admin can complete the Create Test wizard and the newly created test appears in the Tests list and is startable to instructions.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to create a new test
Fill Test E2E Smoke into the test name field
Fill a valid description into the test description field
Proceed to the questions step
Add a question with valid answer choices and mark one correct answer
Proceed to the preview step
Confirm and submit the new test
Click the navigation link to available tests
Verify a test named Test E2E Smoke appears in the tests list

title: Open profile from dashboard
description: Verifies a signed-in user can use the dashboard entry point to reach their profile details page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Wait for the dashboard to finish loading
Click the link to view profile details
Verify the user lands on the profile page

title: Admin can filter aggregated results by class and date range
description: Verifies an admin/teacher can apply class and date-range filters on the admin results page and the aggregated results update accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to view admin results
Select a class filter value
Select a valid date range
Apply the results filters
Verify aggregated results are updated for the selected filters

title: Navigate from dashboard to tests list
description: Verifies a signed-in user can reach the tests list from the dashboard navigation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to view tests
Verify available tests are displayed

title: Prevent unauthenticated access to resources
description: Verifies a signed-out user cannot access the resources page and is redirected to the login page.

steps.description: Navigate to /resources
Verify the user is on the login page

title: Admin results can drill into a student context
description: Verifies an admin/teacher can drill into a student context from aggregated results and see student-level results details.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to view admin results
Apply any available filters to show a populated results set
Open a student context from the aggregated results list
Verify student-level performance details are displayed

title: Process a valid bulk user file and confirm completion
description: Verifies an administrator can upload a valid user file, review the validation summary, confirm processing, and see a processed confirmation state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the bulk user upload wizard
Upload a valid CSV/Excel file containing users
Confirm the upload after reviewing the validation summary
Verify a processed confirmation state is displayed

title: Upload a file and see it listed in My Uploads
description: Verifies a signed-in user can add a new upload and it appears in the uploads list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to My Uploads
Upload a new file using the upload control
Verify the newly added upload appears in the uploads list

title: Edit and save profile details
description: Verifies a signed-in user can edit profile fields, save changes, and see the updated profile details reflected.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the profile page
Fill a valid new value into an editable profile field
Save profile changes
Verify the profile shows the updated details

title: Browse educational resources list
description: Verifies a signed-in user can navigate to resources and browse available materials.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to view resources
Verify a list of educational materials is displayed

title: Uploaded item remains visible after refresh of the uploads view
description: Verifies that after adding an upload, returning to the uploads view still shows the upload in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to My Uploads
Upload a new file using the upload control
Click the navigation link to Dashboard
Click the navigation link to My Uploads
Verify an uploads list is displayed and includes the most recently added item

title: Return to tests list from instructions without starting
description: Verifies a user can leave the instructions screen and return to the tests list without starting the assessment.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to view tests
Select a test from the list to view its instructions
Click the control to go back to the tests list
Verify available tests are displayed

title: Perform a management action and see updated state reflected in the list
description: Verifies an admin can execute a management action on a list entry and the list reflects the updated state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to Management
Perform an available management action on a user in the list
Verify the list reflects the updated state for that user

title: View existing uploads list
description: Verifies a signed-in user can access My Uploads and see the uploads list or an empty state when no uploads exist.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}

Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to My Uploads

title: Retry bulk upload after validation errors
description: Verifies an administrator can retry by uploading a corrected file after a malformed upload and then reach the processed confirmation state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the bulk user upload wizard
Upload a malformed CSV/Excel file
Upload a corrected valid CSV/Excel file
Confirm the upload after reviewing the validation summary
Verify a processed confirmation state is displayed

title: Student results page handles no results yet
description: Verifies that when the student has no results to show, the student results page displays an empty state rather than failing to render.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to view student results
Verify either results details are displayed or an empty state message is visible

title: Prevent upload when no file is selected
description: Verifies the upload flow blocks submission when no file is selected and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login

Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to My Uploads

title: Prevent progressing in the Create Test wizard when required fields are missing

title: Reject invalid login credentials with a visible error
description: Verifies submitting invalid credentials does not log the user in and shows an invalid-credentials message.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill invalid.user@example.com into the email field
Fill wrong-password into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify an invalid-credentials error message is visible
Verify the user remains on the login page
